calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2023 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

J. Michael Echevarria; BWA Law Group, APC; 714-581-8838; appearing on behalf of defendant and moving party Sandra Saucedo-Alvarez.
James W. Lucey; Tobener Ravenscroft LLP; 415-504-2165; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Richard Patterson.

Hearing held. "Defendant's Notice of Evidence in Support of Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons" is discussed. The court notes that the evidence submitted by defendant does not appear to be competent or admissable, as it was not authenticated by a declaration sworn under penalty of perjury. Plaintiff's counsel states that even if defendant's evidence was competent, none of it establishes that she does not reside in San Francisco. Defendant's counsel requests a continuance and submits an offer of proof that defendant can provide competent and admissable evidence. The court denies defendant's request for a continuance. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SANDRA SAUCEDO-ALVAREZ'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is denied.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Continued To Feb-09-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SANDRA SAUCEDO-ALVAREZ'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is Transferred to be heard in department 501 on February 9, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all wrongful eviction cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
